name: Apple Honey Oatmeal Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 Granny Smith Apple (peeled, cored, and finely chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Grease baking sheets with shortening or cooking spray.
3. Place sheets of foil on a countertop for cooling cookies.
4. In a large bowl, combine the shortening, brown sugar, egg, milk, honey, and vanilla extract. Beat with an electric mixer at medium speed until well blended.
5. In another bowl, mix together oats, flour, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon.
6. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture at a low speed until just combined.
7. Stir in raisins, walnuts, and chopped apple.
8. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough about 3 inches apart onto the prepared baking sheets.
9. Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until lightly browned. Do not overbake.
10. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for 2 minutes before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely. Makes 3 dozen cookies.
